title: Recommendations for small law office
excerpt: We are a small law office exploring Monday.com.  Our team focuses on corporate law, so our needs would be different than that of a civil or criminal litigation office.  We are open to engaging a consultant to help us des…

posts.author: LVenezia (Lori Venezia)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a small law office exploring Monday.com. Our team focuses on corporate law, so our needs would be different than that of a civil or criminal litigation office. We are open to engaging a consultant to help us design templates and workflow to get us up and running.

posts.author: Colin2 (Colin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Lori,

Monday.com can be really helpful for legal teams.
I have experience setting up workflows for corporate law firms.

Happy to chat about creating templates and processes to get you started.

You can reach out to me on my email here

Colin
